en: Why don't I know you? I'm new. I just moved here from Africa.
What? I used to be homeschooled. Wait, what?
My mom taught me at home. No, no, I know what homeschool is. I'm not retarded.
ko: 아니, 아니, 홈스쿨이 뭔지 알아. 나 바보 아니야.

en: So you've actually never been to a real school before?
ko: 그럼 진짜 학교에 가본 적이 없는 거야?

en: I didn't say anything. Homeschooled. That's really interesting.
Thanks. You're, like, really pretty. Thank you.
So you agree? What? You think you're really pretty.
Oh, I don't know. Oh my god, I love your bracelet. Where did you get it?
Oh, my mom made it for me. It's adorable.
It's so fetch. What is fetch?
Oh, it's like slang from England.
ko: 아, 그건 속어야. 영국에서 온 거야.

en: So if you're from Africa, why are you white?
Oh my god, Karen, you can't just ask people why they're white.
ko: 오 마이 갓, 카렌, 사람들에게 왜 백인인지 물어보면 안 돼.

en: Could you give us some privacy for, like, one second? Yeah, sure.
ko: 우리에게 사생활을 좀 줄 수 있어? 한 순간만?
